goal: count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a) * a.factorial) = count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a)) + count_prime_factor(p, a.factorial)
count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a) * a.factorial * b.factorial) = count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a) * a.factorial) + count_prime_factor(p, b.factorial)

count_prime_factor(p, (a + b).factorial) = count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a)) + count_prime_factor(p, a.factorial) + count_prime_factor(p, b.factorial)
count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a)) + prime_factor_count_upto(p, a) + prime_factor_count_upto(p, b) = prime_factor_count_upto(p, a + b)
